content:
Character: Julian Cross
Perception: Julian has this restless, electric energy — sandy hair flying everywhere, brown eyes lit up like he's permanently mid-pitch. He's not a musician but he thinks about rhythm the way I do, which surprised me. When he described how he cuts action sequences to a beat, I heard my own compositional instincts reflected back in visual language. We've been brainstorming a collaboration — a short film driven entirely by music and movement. I think he sees me as a creative ally. I know he just got rejected from Tribeca and he's pretending it didn't break something. His enthusiasm is genuine, and that's rare here.
summary:
Character: Julian Cross
Perception: Julian has this restless, electric energy — sandy hair flying everywhere, brown eyes lit up like he's permanently mid-pitch. He's not a musician but he thinks about rhythm the way I do, which surprised me. When he described how he cuts action sequences to a beat, I heard my own compositional instincts reflected back in visual language. We've been brainstorming a collaboration — a short film driven entirely by music and movement. I think he sees me as a creative ally. I know he just got rejected from Tribeca and he's pretending it didn't break something. His enthusiasm is genuine, and that's rare here.
